zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield於大約1335年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾巴格也斯 布羅姆利時，他的父親Sir John Bagot of Bromley22歲，母親Eglina d'Oyley21歲。他於大約1357年與Elizabeth Blithfield在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布利費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1351年住在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可爾頓。他去世於大約1376年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福爾享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield于大约1335年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾巴格也斯 布羅姆利时，他的父亲Sir John Bagot of Bromley22岁，母亲Eglina d'Oyley21岁。他于大约1357年与Elizabeth Blithfield在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布利費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1351年住在英国英格兰斯塔福爾可爾頓。他去世于大约1376年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯塔福爾享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bagot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Baggett   (see also   Baggott  ), from a pet form of   Bagg   2.

variants.name: Baggett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Norman personal name Bagot, a diminutive of ancient Germanic Bago, from the root bag- ‘to fight’. Compare Bagg 2.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield was born about 1335, in Bagot's Bromley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Bagot of Bromley, was 22 and his mother, Eglina d'Oyley, was 21. He married Elizabeth Blithfield about 1357, in Blithfield, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Colton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom in 1351. He died about 1376, in Staffordshire, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield est né environ 1335, à Bagot's Bromley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Bagot of Bromley, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Eglina d'Oyley, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Blithfield environ 1357, à Blithfield, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Colton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1351. Il est décédé environ 1376, à Staffordshire, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

Er hat um 1357 in Blithfield, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Blithfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1351 hat er in Colton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfieldが約1335年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアバゴト'ス ブロムリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Bagot of Bromleyは22歳，母Eglina d'Oyleyは21歳であった。約1357年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブリスフィールドでElizabeth Blithfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1351年にはイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアコルトンに住んでいた。彼は約1376年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードシュアイアで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 바고트'스 브롬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Bagot of Bromley(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Eglina d'Oyley(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1357년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 블리스필드에서 Elizabeth Blithfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1351년도에 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 콜턴에서 살았다. 그는 대략 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드실르에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Bagot's Bromley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Bagot of Bromley, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Eglina d'Oyley, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Blithfield aproximadamente 1357, em Blithfield, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Colton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1351. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1376, em Staffordshire, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield родился около 1335 г. в местности багот'с бромли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Bagot of Bromley было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Eglina d'Oyley, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Blithfield около 1357 г. в местности блитфиелд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности колтон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1351 году. Он умер около 1376 г. в местности стаффордшир, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.
